name: eduverse-webapps
description: *"Where Learning Becomes an Adventure"* — a gamified PWA for Malaysian **KSSR Semakan** Year 5 & 6 students covering **Bahasa Melayu, English, Mathematics, Science, Reka Bentuk dan Teknologi, Geografi and Music**, built to run entirely on **free-tier services (RM0)**.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap sync
